chat_log.content:
Looking at your profile, we're just starting — this is the intake interview. I have a blank slate, which means we need about 30 minutes to build an accurate picture of where you actually are.

Before we do anything else, I want to get the honest version of your situation — not the elevator pitch, the real one. I'll ask about your background, what you're building, and what you actually want. From that I'll build a profile that shapes how I coach you. There are no right answers. The less polished your answers are, the more useful this will be.

Let's start with your background.

What did you do before this? Not the LinkedIn version — what did the work actually involve, and how long did you do it?
